chapter_title.en: Chapter on Invalidating Testimony Regarding Injustice, Usury, and Contradiction to the Sunnah

text: رِوَايَةِ أَبِي اَلْحُسَيْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَسَدِيِّ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تَشْهَدْ عَلَى مَنْ يُطَلِّقُ لِغَيْرِ اَلسُّنَّةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3350 - In a narration from Abu al-Husayn Muhammad ibn Ja'far al-Asadi (may Allah (swt) be pleased with him), Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Do not bear witness for one who divorces contrary to the Sunnah."
